parameters.query:
SELECT id, carrera, file_path, file_name
FROM uploads
WHERE timestamp > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY carrera;

SELECT id FROM clases
WHERE carrera = '{{ $json.carrera }}'
  AND materia = '{{ $json.materia }}'
  AND dia = '{{ $json.dia }}'
  AND hora_inicio = '{{ $json.hora_inicio }}'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
  c.carrera,
  c.materia,
  c.ciclo,
  c.paralelo,
  c.docente,
  c.dia,
  c.hora_inicio,
  c.hora_fin,
  c.num_estudiantes,
  a.nombre as aula_asignada,
  a.capacidad,
  a.edificio
FROM distribucion d
JOIN clases c ON d.clase_id = c.id
JOIN aulas a ON d.aula_id = a.id
ORDER BY c.carrera, c.ciclo, c.dia, c.hora_inicio;
